mapper.update: UPDATE user_review_profiles SET tier = #{tier}::VARCHAR, trust_score = #{trustScore}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, avg_review_length = #{avgReviewLength}, helpful_votes_received = #{helpfulVotesReceived}, verified_trips_count = #{verifiedTripsCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_review_profiles SET review_count = review_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_review_profiles SET review_count = GREATEST(review_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
